public_reputation: Known around Serpent Measure through day-to-day work as local fixer.
appearance: Tamsin Fieldmere usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their local fixer status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Knows who actually gets things done when formal systems slow down or become too expensive to trust. In Serpent Measure, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of local fixer in and around Serpent Measure, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Serpent Measure workable through the obligations of local fixer while managing the immediate pressure of shortfall anxiety, coercive bookkeeping.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of local fixer credible while absorbing the strain created by shortfall anxiety, coercive bookkeeping.

adventure_hooks.summary: Tamsin Fieldmere can draw the party into a locality problem centered on local fixer duties in Serpent Measure.
Tamsin Fieldmere becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with shortfall anxiety, coercive bookkeeping around Serpent Measure.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: In public, Tamsin Fieldmere is immediately readable as a local fixer tied to Serpent Measure.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Serpent Measure: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Tamsin Fieldmere presents as someone shaped by the duties of a local fixer and the daily pressures of Serpent Measure.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a local fixer, and proof that strangers will not make Serpent Measure harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Tamsin Fieldmere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a local fixer too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can get difficult things done through informal channels.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Tamsin Fieldmere adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Tamsin Fieldmere always knows more about Serpent Measure than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a local fixer in Serpent Measure.
